zh.lifeSummary: Ann Morley於1410年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 分波洛。她於1434年與John Gilbert在英國素福爾可格亞特 分波洛結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年在她的家鄉享年27歲。

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: Ann Morley was born in 1410, in Great Finborough, Suffolk, England. She married John Gilbert in 1434, in Great Finborough, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1437, in her hometown, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Ann Morley est née en 1410, à Great Finborough, Suffolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Gilbert en 1434, à Great Finborough, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1437, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Morleyは1410年にイギリススフォルクグレアト フィンボロウで生まれた。1434年にイギリススフォルクグレアト フィンボロウでJohn Gilbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年に故郷で27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Morley(은)는 1410년 영국 수폴크 그리트 핑버루그h에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 수폴크 그리트 핑버루그h에서 John Gilbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 그녀의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ann Morley родилась в 1410 г. в местности грит финбороую, суффолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gilbert в 1434 г. в местности грит финбороую, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1437 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 27 лет.
